Meaning.Vi: Cây hoa hồng (thực vật có hoa thuộc chi Rosa, thường có gai và hoa thơm)
Meaning.En: A genus of flowering shrubs in the rose family, known for their fragrant, often thorny flowers; commonly cultivated for ornamental and commercial purposes.
Meaning.Example: The garden was filled with the sweet scent of rosa as the morning dew glistened on the petals.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả một khu vườn trồng hoa hồng đang nở rộ.
Situation.En: Describing a garden where roses are in full bloom.

Situation.Vi: Ngành công nghiệp hương nước hoa sử dụng tinh dầu từ hoa rosa.
Situation.En: The perfume industry extracts essential oil from rosa flowers.
